title: urvillea oliveirae
intro: Urvillea oliveirae, also known as the "golden shower" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Urvillea oliveirae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
